scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/vizform-vanilla-d3 && npm run build -w packages/vizform-react-d3 && npm run build -w apps/sliceboard && npm run build:layercharts
scripts.build:layercharts: LAYERCHARTS_BASE=/layercharts/ npm run build -w apps/vanilla-bireactive-layercharts-spike && rm -rf apps/sliceboard/dist/layercharts && cp -R apps/vanilla-bireactive-layercharts-spike/dist apps/sliceboard/dist/layercharts
scripts.dev: concurrently -n sliceboard,vanilla-bireactive-layercharts "npm run dev -w apps/sliceboard" "npm run dev -w apps/vanilla-bireactive-layercharts-spike"
